schemas.desc_speed: Name of the column containing direct speed measurements. Leave null if it doesn't exist.
schemas.desc_flow: Name of the column containing direct traffic flow or vehicle count measurements (flow/volume). Leave null if it doesn't exist.
schemas.desc_intensity: Name of the column containing direct density or intensity measurements. Leave null if it doesn't exist.
schemas.desc_distance: Name of the column representing spatial distance or section length.
schemas.desc_time: Name of the column representing elapsed time, duration, or time variance.
schemas.desc_occupancy: Name of the column representing road occupancy (percentage of time the sensor was occupied).
schemas.desc_confidence: Average cosine similarity confidence of the semantic matching (0.0 to 1.0).
